tagline: You can now add other Databricks apps and Unity Catalog tables as resources for your Databricks app.
what_it_does: You can now add other Databricks apps and Unity Catalog tables as resources for your Databricks app. App resources enable app to app communication, and table resources provide governed access to structured data. Add Unity Catalog tables as Databricks Apps resources so your app can query and modify data stored in Unity Catalog with governance and access control.
why_it_matters: App resources enable app to app communication, and table resources provide governed access to structured data.

capabilities.title: name: UCTABLENAME valueFrom: table #
capabilities.desc: name: UCTABLENAME valueFrom: table # Use your custom resource key if different

key_takeaway: You can now add other Databricks apps and Unity Catalog tables as resources for your Databricks app.
